title: Sewers, Hand
description: Sew, join, reinforce, or finish, usually with needle and thread, a variety of manufactured items. Includes weavers and stitchers.

tasks.text: Select thread, twine, cord, or yarn to be used, and thread needles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure and align parts, fasteners, or trimmings, following seams, edges, or markings on parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Trim excess threads or edges of parts, using scissors or knives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sew, join, reinforce, or finish parts of articles, such as garments, books, mattresses, toys, and wigs, using needles and thread or other materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use different sewing techniques such as felling, tacking, basting, embroidery, and fagoting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit garments on clients, altering as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Smooth seams with heated irons, flat bones, or rubbing sticks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw and cut patterns according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fold, twist, stretch, or drape material, and secure articles in preparation for sewing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sew buttonholes, or add lace or other trimming.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tie, knit, weave or knot ribbon, yarn, or decorative materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
